channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: A Supreme Court ruling stripped Haitian migrants of their te…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A Supreme Court ruling stripped Haitian migrants of their temporary legal status. Those with U.S.-born children face an agonizing choice if deported: Should they take them to a still-dangerous Haiti? n.pr/4wkzbcZ
item.content:encoded: A Supreme Court ruling stripped Haitian migrants of their temporary legal status. Those with U.S.-born children face an agonizing choice if deported: Should they take them to a still-dangerous Haiti? n.pr/4wkzbcZ

item.title: 今週は… 🔸“Number_iならでは”がわかる曲かも？ 🔸剣持刀也すぎるし、ピノキオピーすぎる 🔸YAOは…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
今週は…
🔸“Number_iならでは”がわかる曲かも？
🔸剣持刀也すぎるし、ピノキオピーすぎる
🔸YAOはジャンルや価値観を横断し共鳴

詳しくは👇
https://natalie.mu/music/column/682281?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

今盛り上がっている曲について解説する連載
🔭#再生数急上昇ソング定点観測🔭

item.title: Marine biologists off of Baja California recorded one orca t…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Marine biologists off of Baja California recorded one orca teeing up another to smash a sunfish into pieces. Scientists say there could be a reason for this behavior — or it could be just for entertainment. n.pr/4vPJc0K
item.content:encoded: Marine biologists off of Baja California recorded one orca teeing up another to smash a sunfish into pieces. Scientists say there could be a reason for this behavior — or it could be just for entertainment. n.pr/4vPJc0K

・横山直弘

item.title: Indian activist Sonam Wangchuk ended a 26-day hunger strike …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Indian activist Sonam Wangchuk ended a 26-day hunger strike on Friday that helped galvanize a youth movement that's become one of India's largest protests in recent years, but demonstrators vowed to continue until the education minister resigns. n.pr/4bEVS32
item.content:encoded: Indian activist Sonam Wangchuk ended a 26-day hunger strike on Friday that helped galvanize a youth movement that's become one of India's largest protests in recent years, but demonstrators vowed to continue until the education minister resigns. n.pr/4bEVS32

item.title: Secretary of State Marco Rubio, who met with his Russian cou…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio, who met with his Russian counterpart Sergey Lavrov, said that President Trump was committed to the work "if conditions and factors have changed to make that possible." n.pr/4b9GKus
item.content:encoded: Secretary of State Marco Rubio, who met with his Russian counterpart Sergey Lavrov, said that President Trump was committed to the work "if conditions and factors have changed to make that possible." n.pr/4b9GKus

item.title: ピアノと歌の魅力届けるライブイベント J-WAVE PIANOMEN🎹🎤 清塚信也、HIROBA、三浦大知、…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
ピアノと歌の魅力届けるライブイベント
J-WAVE PIANOMEN🎹🎤

item.title: New Music Friday | July 24 Record Club is excited to showca…
item.author: Record Club (@record.club)
item.description:
New Music Friday | July 24

Record Club is excited to showcase new music from The Strokes, Charli xcx, and more. Which release did you decide to check out first tonight? Were there any we missed? Let us know in the comments! For a more comprehensive list of releases head to record.club!
item.content:encoded:
New Music Friday | July 24

Record Club is excited to showcase new music from The Strokes, Charli xcx, and more. Which release did you decide to check out first tonight? Were there any we missed? Let us know in the comments! For a more comprehensive list of releases head to record.club!

item.title: The Justice Department is dropping the subpoenas it filed de…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Justice Department is dropping the subpoenas it filed demanding grand jury testimony and phone records from New York Times journalists after sharp questioning Thursday from a federal judge. n.pr/4b5pIh8
item.content:encoded: The Justice Department is dropping the subpoenas it filed demanding grand jury testimony and phone records from New York Times journalists after sharp questioning Thursday from a federal judge. n.pr/4b5pIh8

item.title: Tonight Appalachian roots rocker John R. Miller returned to …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Tonight Appalachian roots rocker John R. Miller returned to the Grand Ole Opry and introduced a “monumentally influential practitioner of the guitar” as his surprise guest. J Mascis then joined Miller onstage to perform “Steering Wheel Drums,” marking the @dinosaurjr.com frontman’s own Opry debut.
item.content:encoded: Tonight Appalachian roots rocker John R. Miller returned to the Grand Ole Opry and introduced a “monumentally influential practitioner of the guitar” as his surprise guest. J Mascis then joined Miller onstage to perform “Steering Wheel Drums,” marking the @dinosaurjr.com frontman’s own Opry debut.

item.title: Fiona Apple's debut album 'Tidal' was released 30 years ago …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Fiona Apple's debut album 'Tidal' was released 30 years ago today. 💿 What's your favorite track?
item.content:encoded: Fiona Apple's debut album 'Tidal' was released 30 years ago today. 💿 What's your favorite track?

item.title: The United States will slap taxes of 10% to 12.5% on imports…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The United States will slap taxes of 10% to 12.5% on imports from 60 countries accounting for 99% of U.S. imports, charging that they have inadequately enforced bans on goods produced by forced labor. n.pr/4gUHhnO
item.content:encoded: The United States will slap taxes of 10% to 12.5% on imports from 60 countries accounting for 99% of U.S. imports, charging that they have inadequately enforced bans on goods produced by forced labor. n.pr/4gUHhnO
